title: Ooglith cloaker

An '''ooglith cloaker''' was a creature [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineered]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to function as an organic [[Environment suit/Legends|environment suit]].

==Description==
Ooglith cloakers were [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineered]] creatures employed by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] as organic [[Environment suit/Legends|environment suits]]<ref name="RPG-Core" /> that could protect the wearer from freezing temperatures, [[Water/Legends|water]] pressure<ref name="VP">''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''</ref> and the [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]] of [[Realspace/Legends|space]].<ref name="Rebirth">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''</ref> The cloaker was pulled over the wearer's feet, where it then extended up the body. As it did so, the cloaker would insert thousands of tiny tendrils into the wearer's pores. The process was painful for the wearer.<ref name="RPG-Core" /> 

The cloaker covered the wearer's face, but was transparent around the face,<ref name="EGTAS">''[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|The Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''</ref> allowing the Yuuzhan Vong to display the glory of their wearer's disfigurements.<ref name="VP" /> Removing the cloaker was achieved by pressing a hidden organ.<ref name="RPG-Core" /> This could be triggered by anyone, not just the wearer, which did allow enemies to start the removal process during a fight.<ref name="VP" /> The cloaker was closely related to the [[ooglith masquer]], and often used in conjunction with the [[gnullith]] which was latched over the wearer's face and allowing them to breathe.<ref name="RPG-Core" />

Yuuzhan Vong [[Yorik-et]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] wore ooglith cloakers while flying their vessels. A variant of the ooglith cloaker created a simple transparent bubble around an individual's head. This gave an individual a limited amount of [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] while in [[Realspace/Legends|space]].<ref name="ELI">''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]''</ref>

==History==
[[Prefect (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Prefect]] [[Da'Gara]] and the Yuuzhan Vong under his command used ooglith cloakers to operate underwater while establishing a [[Yammosk]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Helska IV]]. The cloaker protected the Yuuzhan Vong from the freezing cold temperatures and pressure of the water.<ref name="VP" />

Yuuzhan Vong captives [[Danni Quee]] and [[Miko Reglia]] used stolen ooglith cloakers in an attempt to escape from [[Da'Gara's worldship]]. [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] wore a captured ooglith cloaker during his mission to Helska IV.<ref name="VP" />
